landing.heroTitle: Build pages your users will love
landing.heroSubtitle: Diva Pages gives you beautiful, responsive page designs out of the box. Ship faster with a component library that feels like it was made for you.
landing.featuresHeadline: Everything you need to ship fast
landing.featuresSubtitle: Pre-built components, consistent design, and zero friction.
landing.featureComponentsDesc: Buttons, cards, forms, dialogs, navigation — everything you need to build a complete page.
landing.featureThemesDesc: Dark mode built in. Change your brand colors with a single CSS variable.
landing.featureFastDesc: Built on Astro — zero JS by default, instant page loads, and optimized builds.
landing.featureSecureDesc: Built-in CSP support, type-safe forms with Zod validation, and SSR.
landing.featureTeamDesc: Workspace monorepo, shared component library, and consistent design tokens.
landing.featureTestedDesc: Used in production by teams shipping docs, dashboards, and marketing sites.
landing.pricingSubtitle: No hidden fees. No surprise charges.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of teams using Diva Pages to ship beautiful products faster.
landing.tagline: Beautiful, responsive page designs built with Astro and shadcn/ui.
landing.aboutP1: We started Diva in 2025 with a simple mission: make it easy for teams to build beautiful, performant web pages without reinventing the wheel every time.
landing.aboutP2: Our component library combines the power of Astro with the elegance of shadcn/ui, giving you a production-ready design system that scales from landing pages to full-featured applications.
landing.valueSimplicityDesc: We believe great design is invisible. Every component should feel natural.
landing.valuePerformanceDesc: Zero JS by default. Your pages should load in milliseconds, not seconds.
landing.valueAccessibilityDesc: Every component follows WAI-ARIA standards. The web should work for everyone.
landing.valueOpennessDesc: Built with open source tools. No lock-in, no black boxes, full transparency.
landing.contactDesc: Have a question, feedback, or want to talk about your project? We'd love to hear from you.
landing.name: Name
landing.messageSent: Message sent. We'll get back to you soon.
